de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init

Class IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer
  • Enclosing interface:
    IPersistablePO

    public static class IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer
extends Object
    The class stored in a Properties instance via key must provide the static method with the following signature: public static LoadedPOContainer loadFrom(InitConfig initConfig, Properties properties) throws IOException This method is called by the ProblemLoader to recreate a proof obligation. This class defines the result of this method which is the created proof obligation and its proof number.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private int proofNum
      The proof number which is 0 by default.
